use_cases: Displaying promotional offers and deals in a horizontally scrollable carousel
Showcasing brand partnerships with logo and promo code information
Highlighting limited-time deals with tag badges and CTAs
Creating engagement through hover-animated offer cards with image zoom
Enabling easy navigation between multiple promotional offers
ai_summary: An animated offer carousel component with hover-lift card effects and image zoom transitions. Displays promotional content including tags, titles, descriptions, brand logos, and promo codes in a scrollable snap carousel. Built with Framer Motion for smooth spring animations and Tailwind CSS for styling, optimized for e-commerce promotions and deal showcases.
